overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking and running along a coastal path at dusk. The character moves from a rocky beach through vegetated areas with palm trees to a roadside where vehicles pass by, with mountains visible in the background throughout.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline beside the calm water

entered.detail: calm lake water reflecting the purple dusk sky
large mountain silhouetted against the twilight sky
pebble and rock covered beach terrain
dense pine forest covering the distant hills
large rocks scattered along the waterline

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, open rocky beach at dusk. The calm lake water stretches to the right with mountains silhouetted against the purple twilight sky in the distance. The terrain is covered in pebbles and scattered boulders with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: vegetated coastal path with palm trees

events.description: character turns left moving from open beach into vegetated area with palm trees
character transitions from walking to running pace

agents.ego_description: walking then running along a dirt path lined with palm trees and bushes, moving away from the immediate shoreline

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the left side of the path
large tree with light bark and spreading branches overhanging the path
dense green shrubbery on the right side of the path
wooden pier structure extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The character turns left from the beach into a vegetated path lined with palm trees and bushes. The lighting becomes slightly darker under the tree canopy as the character transitions from walking to running. The lake remains visible in the distance to the right, with a wooden dock structure appearing near the water's edge.

events.description: character reaches the asphalt road from the vegetated path
black SUV passes by on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: running along the grassy roadside verge as vehicles pass by on the adjacent road

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past on the road with headlights on

entered.detail: paved two-lane road with white lane markings
cars driving along the road with headlights illuminated
tree with distinctive purple foliage beside the road
flowering bushes with purple blooms along the roadside

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the vegetated path onto a rural roadside, running alongside the asphalt as dusk deepens into evening. Vehicles with headlights on pass by on the left, including a black SUV. The terrain transitions to a grassy verge with flowering bushes, while the mountain range remains visible ahead against the darkening sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rocky shoreline that gradually transitions into a sheltered vegetated path and finally onto a rural roadside at dusk. It begins with the character walking across a pebble-strewn beach beside calm lake water, with mountains silhouetted against a purple twilight sky. As the character turns left, the scene shifts into a denser area of palm trees and bushes where the lighting dims under the canopy and the pace increases to a run. The camera then emerges from the foliage onto an asphalt road, where the environment opens up to a grassy verge with flowering bushes. Finally, the shot follows the character running alongside the road as vehicles with glowing headlights pass by under a deepening evening sky.
